data.title: Fifteen Years Later: Remembering Satoshi Nakamoto’s Final Public Appearance
data.description:
December 13, 2025 marks fifteen years since Satoshi Nakamoto, the creator of Bitcoin, was last publicly active. The moment is preserved in a simple forum record: a profile showing satoshi’s final login on December 13, 2010, at 4:45 PM, ending an extraordinary but brief public presence that fundamentally reshaped global finance.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/fifteen-years-later-remembering-satoshi-nakamotos-final-public-appearance/

data.title: US lawmakers call Trump’s China Nvidia chip decision a ‘colossal failure’ for national security
data.description:
Seven Democratic senators are calling Trump’s approval of Nvidia’s H200 chip sales in China a major blow to U. S. security policy. They sent a letter to Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick on Friday, warning that the move hands Beijing access to hardware they say Washington has spent years trying to restrict. The senators argued that letting Nvidia […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/lawmakers-trumps-china-nvidia-chip-decision/

data.title: Solana Mobile Collaborates with Chip Manufacturers for Android Integration
data.description: According to Odaily, Solana Mobile has announced on the X platform that it is collaborating with chip manufacturers to integrate hardware kits into over 2 billion Android devices.

data.title: "1011 Insider Whale" suffered a maximum unrealized loss of $22.43 million in 24 hours.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi's monitoring, the insider whale who shorted after the 1011 flash crash suffered a maximum floating loss of $22.43 million in 24 hours. The floating loss of the long position worth $670 million has now narrowed to $12.97 million, of which ETH accounts for more than 80% of the floating loss, with a single coin holding of nearly $550 million. Because the margin is as high as $129 million, the possibility of liquidation is extremely low.

data.title: Bitdeer Reports Increase in Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: According to Odaily, Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced via Twitter that as of December 12, its Bitcoin holdings have risen to 1,994.1 BTC, excluding customer deposits. Additionally, the company reported a weekly Bitcoin mining output of 136.3 BTC, while selling 134.8 BTC during the same period, resulting in a net increase of 1.5 BTC.

data.title: Strategy has safely weathered the Nasdaq 100 index adjustment, but still faces the risk of being removed from the MSCI index.
data.description: Strategy retained its place in the Nasdaq 100 index during this year's annual review, marking its first successful inclusion since joining the index last December. Following its recent purchase of 10,624 BTC for approximately $962.7 million, Strategy's total holdings reached 660,624 BTC, worth nearly $60 billion. Despite remaining in the index, Strategy's stock price closed down 3.74% that day and has fallen more than 15% over the past month. MSCI is considering excluding companies with more than 50% of their total assets from its indices, a move that could affect Strategy as early as January. JPMorgan has warned that if MSCI implements this rule, passive funds tracking the index could be forced to sell up to $2.8 billion worth of Strategy stock. Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor and CEO Phong Le have written to MSCI arguing that the company is an operating entity, not a passive investment vehicle.

data.title: American Bitcoin Expands Bitcoin Reserves with Strategic Acquisitions
data.description: According to PANews, blockchain analyst Emmett Gallic shared updates on the Bitcoin reserves of American Bitcoin (ABTC), a cryptocurrency mining company supported by the Trump family. Over the past week, ABTC increased its Bitcoin holdings by approximately 623 BTC. Of this, around 80 BTC were acquired through mining activities, while 542 BTC were obtained via strategic purchases in the open market. As a result, the company's total Bitcoin holdings have risen to 4,941 BTC, with a current market value of approximately $450 million.

data.title: XRP Could Fall 40% if $2 Support Breaks, Analyst Warns
data.description:
XRP has suspended its rally, and it is not showing signs of a price resurgence soon as it risks losing the crucial $2 support.
source: https://u.today/xrp-could-fall-40-if-2-support-breaks-analyst-warns
